text:
【仮面】から突然の秘匿通信を受ける。
「ナベリウス、約束の地で待つ」
二人しか知らないはずの約束。
再会を誓った樹の元で、全ては語られる。
――――――――――――――――――――
失敗条件/戦闘不能後、リタイアを選択

【仮面】から突然の秘匿通信を受ける。
「ナベリウス、約束の地で待つ」
二人しか知らないはずの約束。
再会を誓った樹の元で、全ては語られる。

We have received a clandestine message from
Persona the Masked. "Naverius, I await you at the
promised location." The promised location should
be known only to the two parties involved.
Everything will be revealed under the tree where
reunion was pledged.
-------------------------------------------
You will fail this quest if you become incapacitated
or retire.

We received an encrypted message from Persona the Masked.
"Naverius, I await you at the promised location." The location
should be known only by the two involved. Everything will be
revealed under the tree where reunion was pledged.
